title: TORUS ENGLISH CLASSES - 211info
text: TORUS TORUS ENGLISH CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides virtual and in person English as a second language (ESL) courses for limited English proficient (LEP) individuals. Offers volunteering opportunities to adults who are interested in teaching English. Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Rockwood Library: Mondays 2pm-3:30pm Holgate Library: Tuesdays 6pm-7:30pm Midland Library: Wednesdays 6pm-7:30pm Gresham Library: Thursdays 2pm-3:30pm Email (503) 753-6129 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 753-6129 Ramin Tokhi Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Students: None Volunteers: For participants residing outside of the US, proof of English language proficiency is required (English degree or certificate) LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: English as a Second Language Volunteer Opportunities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
